nudges.nourishment: Your companion is looking for some nourishment. How about a small snack?
nudges.rest: Feeling tired is valid. Rest is part of healing.
nudges.joy: A moment of play can shift your mood. Your companion would love your company.
nudges.vitality: Your companion needs some care. You deserve care too.

affirmations: You showed up today. That matters.
Small steps are still steps forward.
You don't have to feel okay to keep going.
Your companion is always here when you need them.
Taking care of something else can be a gentle way to take care of yourself.
You are doing better than you think.
Rest is productive. Your companion understands.
returnGreeting: Welcome back. Your companion missed you.
firstMeeting: Hello! I'm so glad you're here.
